vulnerabilities.title: Improper Control of Generation of Code in doT
vulnerabilities.description: The dot package v1.1.2 uses Function() to compile templates. This can be exploited by the attacker if they can control the given template or if they can control the value set on Object.prototype.

vulnerabilities.title: Command Injection in dot
vulnerabilities.description: All versions of dot are vulnerable to Command Injection. The template compilation may execute arbitrary commands if an attacker can inject code in the template or if a Prototype Pollution-like vulnerability can be exploited to alter an Object's prototype.
